title: Public notice board truth ladder
summary: Separates confirmed instructions, verified local facts, unverified reports, and rumors.
content: Public notice board truth ladder is a practical offline routine for public information. Divide the board into official instructions, verified local facts, unverified reports, and questions needing checks. Every item needs date, time, source, and person who posted it. Remove or correct old items instead of letting stale information guide decisions. Do not post private medical, family, or conflict details unless safety requires it. Use simple Greek/English when mixed groups or visitors are present. The goal is to make the action repeatable by a tired person, visible to helpers, and safe enough to stop when official help or a safer option appears.
materials: Marker. Context: “Public notice board truth ladder”.
steps: Divide the board into official instructions, verified local facts, unverified reports, and questions needing checks.
Every item needs date, time, source, and person who posted it.
Remove or correct old items instead of letting stale information guide decisions.
Do not post private medical, family, or conflict details unless safety requires it.
Use simple Greek/English when mixed groups or visitors are present.
warnings: Use Public notice board truth ladder as practical support, not as a replacement for official guidance, trained help, or evacuation when needed.
Urgency does not justify coercion, discrimination, theft, humiliation, or secret decisions in “Public notice board truth ladder”.
common_mistakes: Starting from memory instead of written notes while carrying out “Public notice board truth ladder”
Letting one tired person control the whole process while carrying out “Public notice board truth ladder”
Ignoring the review time while carrying out “Public notice board truth ladder”
alternatives: Use a wall board when many people are involved as a fallback for “Public notice board truth ladder”
Use pocket cards when movement is required as a fallback for “Public notice board truth ladder”
failure_signs: People disagree about the facts, the plan is not being followed, or the situation worsens after the first review during “Public notice board truth ladder”
when_not_to_use: Do not use Public notice board truth ladder to delay emergency care, evacuation, fire response, or official instructions.
short_term: Write the first safe action, responsible person, materials, and next review time. This note applies specifically to Public notice board truth ladder.
long_term: Convert the routine into a repeatable checklist with handover notes and backups. This note applies specifically to Public notice board truth ladder.
if_method_fails: Reduce complexity, stop unsafe work, and switch to the safest available fallback. This note applies specifically to Public notice board truth ladder.
environment_notes: Adapt the routine to heat, cold, crowding, darkness, limited water, and local hazards. This note applies specifically to Public notice board truth ladder.
